---
title: "Distributed Data Systems Review"
subtitle: "Partitioning, Replication, Quorums, Consistency, Consensus, Failover, and Observability"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Distributed architecture objective

Define workload, partition strategy, replication factor, read/write quorum policy, consistency model, and failure assumptions.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
def quorum_intersects(n, r, w):
    return r + w > n

print({"n": 3, "r": 2, "w": 2, "intersects": quorum_intersects(3, 2, 2)})
```

## Operational evidence

Review node health, shard routing, replica lag, quorum outcomes, conflicts, consensus events, and failover drills.

## Governance

Document which workloads require linearizability, which tolerate stale reads, and which need application-level reconciliation.

## Appendix

Attach cluster nodes, shard maps, replica status, quorum policies, operation logs, conflicts, consensus events, and failover records.
